title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 5–8, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's stand- ing on his stretch- Ed arm!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: This is so boring, I'm beginning to feel sleepy...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That straw- hat kid was so scary and strong....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't call me using that name!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: The real purpose of this plan...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Is to eliminate the name "Captain Kuro" forever!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
